sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: The Truth About ON Semiconductor Corp: Is This ‘Boring’ Chip Stock Your Next Power Move?
feed.summary: ON Semiconductor Corp (onsemi) is presented as a crucial, yet often overlooked, player in the technology landscape, powering electric vehicles (EVs), AI data centers, and advanced hardware. The article explores why onsemi, despite not being a "flashy" meme stock, is gaining traction among serious investors due to its essential contributions to high-growth sectors like automotive power and energy-efficient AI infrastructure. It also compares onsemi to Texas Instruments, highlighting onsemi's position as a higher-growth, more future-facing option tied to major tech trends.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips submits development plans for Greater Ekofisk Area
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips and its partners have submitted two Plans for Development and Operation (PDOs) for the Albuskjell, Vest Ekofisk, and Tommeliten Gamma fields in the Greater Ekofisk Area of the North Sea. These plans outline the redevelopment of these fields, with estimated recoverable resources of 90–120 million barrels of oil equivalent and a total investment of Nkr19.5bn ($2.05bn). First gas is expected in Q4 2028, contributing to Europe's energy security.
